scenarios.name: api_questions_read_excludes_fresh_expiry_retry
assertions: expired child-question reads emit one question_closed event
freshly expired child-question reads emit exactly one question.resolve_child_fallback event

scenarios.name: telegram_questions_read_excludes_fresh_expiry_retry
assertions: telegram /questions returns no queued questions after expiry
child control endpoint is attempted exactly once

scenarios.name: helper_preserves_answered_or_dismissed_interleavings
assertions: queued->expired transitions are excluded from same-read retries
